gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/177)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/177)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ النَّاسَ يَرْوُونَ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ إِنَّ الْعَدَسَ بَارَكَ عَلَيْهِ سَبْعُونَ نَبِيّاً فَقَالَ هُوَ الَّذِي يُسَمُّونَهُ عِنْدَكُمُ الْحِمِّصَ وَ نَحْنُ نُسَمِّيهِ الْعَدَسَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from MUawiya Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the people are reporting that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘The Lentils, seventy Prophets<sup>as</sup> have Blessed upon it’’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is that which is named with you as the chick-peas, and we<sup>asws</sup> called it the lentils’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘People narrate that the Holy Prophet has said, “Seventy Prophets have blessed chickpeas.’” He (the Imam) said, ‘This is what you call chickpeas but we call it lintels.’”
